mapper.select:
SELECT c.*, gvi.CONTENT AS NAME_VI, gen.CONTENT AS NAME_EN, gzh.CONTENT AS NAME_ZH, gko.CONTENT AS NAME_KO FROM HR_COMPANY c LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gvi ON c.CPNY_NO = gvi.NO AND gvi.LANGUAGE = 'vi' AND gvi.ACTIVITY = 1 LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gen ON c.CPNY_NO = gen.NO AND gen.LANGUAGE = 'en' AND gen.ACTIVITY = 1 LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gzh ON c.CPNY_NO = gzh.NO AND gzh.LANGUAGE = 'zh' AND gzh.ACTIVITY = 1 LEFT JOIN SY_GLOBAL_NAME gko ON c.CPNY_NO = gko.NO AND gko.LANGUAGE = 'ko' AND gko.ACTIVITY = 1 WHERE 1=1 AND c.ACTIVITY = 1
AND ( c.CPNY_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gvi.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gen.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gzh.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR gko.CONTENT LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY c.ORDERNO, c.CPNY_ID
SELECT * FROM HR_COMPANY ORDER BY CPNY_ID
SELECT * FROM HR_COMPANY WHERE CPNY_ID LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR CPNY_LOCATION LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' ORDER BY CPNY_ID
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM HR_COMPANY WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HR_COMPANY ( CPNY_ID, CPNY_LOCATION, CPNY_ADDR, CPNY_POSTALCODE, CPNY_INTRO, CPNY_HISTORY, CPNY_WEB_ADDR, CPNY_TEL_NO, CPNY_FAX_NO, CPNY_NO, OPERATION_ID, GGS_YN, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO ) VALUES ( #{cpnyId}, #{cpnyLocation}, #{cpnyAddr}, #{cpnyPostalcode}, #{cpnyIntro}, #{cpnyHistory}, #{cpnyWebAddr}, #{cpnyTelNo}, #{cpnyFaxNo}, #{cpnyNo}, #{operationId}, #{ggsYn}, sysdate, #{adminID}, sysdate, #{adminID}, #{activity}, #{orderNo} )
mapper.update: UPDATE HR_COMPANY SET CPNY_LOCATION = #{cpnyLocation}, CPNY_ADDR = #{cpnyAddr}, CPNY_POSTALCODE = #{cpnyPostalcode}, CPNY_INTRO = #{cpnyIntro}, CPNY_HISTORY = #{cpnyHistory}, CPNY_WEB_ADDR = #{cpnyWebAddr}, CPNY_TEL_NO = #{cpnyTelNo}, CPNY_FAX_NO = #{cpnyFaxNo}, OPERATION_ID = #{operationId}, GGS_YN = #{ggsYn}, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, ORDERNO = #{orderNo} WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}
mapper.delete: UPDATE HR_COMPANY SET ACTIVITY = 0, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID} WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}
UPDATE HR_COMPANY SET ACTIVITY = 0, UPDATE_DATE = sysdate, UPDATED_BY = #{adminID} WHERE CPNY_NO = #{cpnyNo}
